modelNotes.en: Static preview resource content. audiences marks which audience landing views (alumni, active, recruiting) surface each resource; an item with no audiences tag is treated as recruiting-visible by default. Every entry here has recorded product-owner sign-off; see bold-docs/features/0003-three-audience-experience/resource-candidates.md.
modelNotes.es: Contenido estatico de recursos de la vista previa. audiences indica en que vistas de audiencia (alumni, active, recruiting) aparece cada recurso; un elemento sin la etiqueta audiences se trata como visible solo para recruiting por defecto. Cada entrada aqui cuenta con aprobacion registrada del dueno del producto.
